prose: **Benzaldehyde Fukui reactivity indices** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact integrals), plain restricted Kohn–Sham (PySCF), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: single-point on user-supplied XYZ (`benzaldehyde.xyz`), no geometry relaxation. SCF converged; no warnings reported. Partial charges by Mulliken. The most electrophilic site is carbon atom 3 (f<sup>+</sup> = 0.39938965, index 3); the most nucleophilic site is oxygen atom 1 (f<sup>-</sup> = 0.23839906, index 1). The dual descriptor (f<sup>+</sup> – f<sup>-</sup>) is largest at C3 (0.36263553). Method: DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard). Files: result JSON at `benzaldehyde_fukui_dft.json`, live log streaming to `fukui_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory.
